Domain: gaithersburggaragedoor.com

The Gaithersburg Garage Doors contact form was hit with a significant spam attack, resulting in approximately 1,000 form submission emails sent to the client before stopping. The client is requesting increased reCAPTCHA security on the contact form to prevent this from recurring. Multiple senior contacts at Guild Garage Group are aware and flagged this with urgency.

Client Goal: Prevent future spam form submissions by strengthening reCAPTCHA security on the Gaithersburg Garage Doors contact form.
